thinking.text:
Now I have a full picture. Let me summarize my findings to the user.

Regarding question 1: Among all personal credit cards from Rho-Bank, the **Platinum Rewards Card** is the **only personal card** offering 10% cash back across all purchases, with the $200 annual fee. So yes, $200 is effectively the lowest (and only) annual fee for a personal card offering unlimited 10% cash back. The **Diamond Elite** offers 5% at $495, and the **Gold Rewards** offers 2.5% at $0. So the Platinum is in a category of its own for 10% flat cash back.

Regarding question 2: The $150 rebate is **automatic** - no need to apply separately. You just need to meet the $7,500 monthly spend threshold in each of the 12 monthly windows of your cardmember year.

Also worth noting: there's a first-year fee waiver promo that ran from June to December 2024 - it may have expired depending on current date. Let me check the current time.
